parityChecklist.description: List section header text from SectionTitle when the title is non-empty.
Primary row text resolved with the same fallback rules as MoveBrowserModel.title(for:).
Secondary row text from RowDetail for branch rows, or Presented.SkillName when the player entry title differs.
Visible row style: next, motion_player, detail, or supplementary.
Root page title comes from the selected character; pushed move pages and motion player pages use the resolved row title.
Number of Next hops required before the destination page appears.
Whether a row opens another move page, opens the motion player, or has no action.
